title: rubus rosaceus subsp. lithophilus
intro: Rubus rosaceus subsp. lithophilus, also known as the Lithophilous Raspberry or Rocky Raspberry, is a subspecies of raspberry plant that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rubus rosaceus subsp. lithophilus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
